svg.text: The Comprehensive Linux Engineer Command List
↳ List all files with details & hidden files
↳ Print first column of a file
↳ Sync files/dirs with ACLs, sparse, xattrs
View logs for a specific service
↳ List open files that have been deleted
Inform OS of partition table changes
↳ Expand filesystem back to fit LV
See allowed sudo commands for user
Fetch all drops dead remote branches
List all local and remote branches
Create and switch to new branch
↳ Run playbook and ask vault pass
Generate allow rules from audit logs
